event.name: IPL 2027 — Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bangalore (Evening, April)

context.pre_match_notes: Evening match, Mumbai, April. Pre-match humidity: 79%. Dew forecast: HIGH. Both teams similar strength in this fixture. Toss: Mumbai won, chose to bat first (rare — went against dew-factor wisdom). Key signal: batting first in high dew conditions is a SportMind contra-indicator.

question: Mumbai batted first in high dew conditions. Does their home advantage offset this structural disadvantage?

verified_outcome.key_variable: dew_factor overrides home_advantage — batting first in dew is structural negative regardless of venue
